title: Junior SEO Specialist at Bombay Shaving Company

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Bombay Shaving Company
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
